disambiguation_rules.department: Explicitly defined as Department of Energy in SEC. 2(1)
disambiguation_rules.secretary: Explicitly defined as Secretary of Energy in SEC. 2(3)
disambiguation_rules.administrator: Explicitly defined as Administrator of NOAA in SEC. 2(4)
disambiguation_rules.director: Resolved to Director of Office of Science and Technology Policy based on context of administering AI Grand Challenges Program; aligns with community-identified role.
disambiguation_rules.head of agency: Generic role reference; not resolved to specific person without further context
disambiguation_rules.assistant administrator: Explicitly defined in SEC. 14(a)(1) as Assistant Administrator for Weather Services of NOAA; previously referenced generically in community context.
disambiguation_rules.director of the national science foundat: Confirmed role directing NSF research support on manipulated or synthesized content and information security per SEC. 3
disambiguation_rules.director of the federal acquisition inst: Confirmed role responsible for developing and implementing ICT acquisition training and reporting progress to Congress and council bodies
disambiguation_rules.national coordinator: Confirmed as official title for head of Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology per SEC. 3023(a)

parsing_rules: When a role is defined as '[Title]' in definitions section, extract both the role and the parent organization if determinable from context.

oddities.note: Document is shown at bill introduction stage (Received; read twice and referred to committee) with only the title and enacting clause present; substantive legislative content not provided in extracted text.
Document is at bill introduction stage (H.R. 6791) with only title, enacting clause, and bill number provided; substantive legislative content not included in extracted text.

Document provided contains only SECTION 1 (SHORT TITLE) with minimal substantive content. The summary references grand challenge areas (health, cybersecurity, national security) and multiple agencies (NSF, DARPA, NIH, Congress, OSTP, NIST, NASA) that are not explicitly mentioned in the provided text section. Full legislative text not available for entity extraction.

Document provided contains only SECTION 1 (SHORT TITLE) with minimal substantive content. The summary references NSF, NIST, and multiple agencies (NSF, DARPA, NIH, Congress, OSTP, NASA) that are not explicitly named in the provided text section. Full legislative text with substantive provisions not available for entity extraction.

Document section contains only title and table of contents structure; substantive legislative language not provided in extracted text. Administrator and consultation roles referenced in summary but not explicitly defined in provided section text.

Document section contains only technical amendments to statutory code sections without introducing new named entities beyond those already extracted from earlier sections. All substantive entity references (Federal Acquisition Regulatory Council, Administrator of General Services, Federal Acquisition Regulation, etc.) were previously extracted.
Document provides only title and short section; substantive legislative text not included in provided excerpt. Full statutory language needed for comprehensive entity extraction.
